title: Macro registry, substitution, and HIR wiring

source.subject: feat(compiler): macro registry, substitution, and HIR/format wiring

body:
## Outcome

Macro registry, substitution, and HIR/format wiring.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Macro work follows platform-spec **language-meta/macros** semantics (registry, expand pass, resolver re-resolve).

## Platform specification

- Implements [Macros](https://beskid-lang.org/platform-spec/language-meta/macros/) (`/platform-spec/language-meta/macros/`) *(required)*

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`9f668d4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/9f668d4) — feat(compiler): macro registry, substitution, and HIR/format wiring
